\tzpentry{ID3392}{Hamiltonian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3392 introduces Hamiltonian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \frac{d\mathcal{H}}{dt} = \chi_{helix} \cdot (\mathbf{S}_{photon} \times \boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff}) $$
